channel.title: MPESB on Gajab Jobs
channel.description: Recent content in MPESB on Gajab Jobs

item.title: MPESB Nursing Officer & Sister Tutor Online Form 2026
item.description: MPESB has announced Nursing Officer and Sister Tutor Recruitment 2026 for a total of 2317 vacancies. The online application starts from 06/04/2026 and ends on 20/04/2026. Eligible candidates with B.Sc Nursing or GNM qualification and valid registration can apply. The selection process includes an online exam followed by merit-based selection.
